ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the trip (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the trip */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is currently located */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the bike (e.g., True for available, False for rented) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the bike (e.g., Good, Under Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of bikes available at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the station information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bike was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bike was returned */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the rental */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
